name: app.R
content:
# app.R - Main Shiny application combining all modules
library(shiny)
library(shinydashboard)
library(shinythemes)
library(plotly)
library(DT)
library(data.table)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# UI Definition
ui <- dashboardPage(
  dashboardHeader(
    title = "India Agricultural & Trade Dashboard",
    titleWidth = 350
  ),
  
  dashboardSidebar(
    width = 350,
    sidebarMenu(
      menuItem("Dashboard Overview", tabName = "overview", icon = icon("dashboard")),
      menuItem("Edible Oil Imports", tabName = "edibleoil", icon = icon("oil-can")),
      menuItem("Fertilizer Imports", tabName = "fertilizer", icon = icon("flask")),
      menuItem("Food Procurement", tabName = "procurement", icon = icon("wheat-alt")),
      menuItem("Food Stock Management", tabName = "stocks", icon = icon("warehouse")),
      menuItem("Trade Analysis", tabName = "trade", icon = icon("exchange-alt")),
      menuItem("Fuel Price Analysis", tabName = "fuelprice", icon = icon("gas-pump")),
      menuItem("Data Download", tabName = "download", icon = icon("download")),
      menuItem("About", tabName = "about", icon = icon("info-circle"))
    ),
    tags$head(
      tags$style(HTML("
        /* Custom CSS */
        .skin-blue .main-header .logo {
          background-color: #2c3e50;
        }
        .skin-blue .main-header .navbar {
          background-color: #34495e;
        }
        .content-wrapper, .right-side {
          background-color: #ecf0f1;
        }
        .box {
          border-radius: 10px;
          box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
        }
        .info-box {
          border-radius: 8px;
          margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        .selectize-input {
          border-radius: 5px;
        }
        .btn {
          border-radius: 5px;
        }
      "))
    )
  ),
  
  dashboardBody(
    tags$head(
      tags$link(rel = "stylesheet", type = "text/css", href = "custom.css")
    ),
    tabItems(
      # Overview Tab
      tabItem(
        tabName = "overview",
        fluidRow(
          column(12,
            h2("India's Agricultural & Trade Dashboard", style = "color: #2c3e50;"),
            p("Comprehensive analysis of India's agricultural imports, food stocks, procurement, and trade patterns", 
              style = "font-size: 16px; color: #7f8c8d;")
          )
        ),
        fluidRow(
          valueBoxOutput("totalImports"),
          valueBoxOutput("procurementVolume"),
          valueBoxOutput("stockLevel"),
          valueBoxOutput("tradeBalance")
        ),
        fluidRow(
          column(6,
            box(
              title = "Quick Summary",
              status = "primary",
              solidHeader = TRUE,
              width = 12,
              collapsible = TRUE,
              tags$div(
                style = "font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6;",
                tags$ul(
                  tags$li("India is one of the world's largest importers of edible oils"),
                  tags$li("Palm oil imports dominate but share is decreasing"),
                  tags$li("Sunflower oil imports have shown significant growth"),
                  tags$li("Food grain stocks show seasonal patterns"),
                  tags$li("Fertilizer imports are crucial for agricultural productivity")
                )
              )
            )
          ),
          column(6,
            box(
              title = "Recent Trends",
              status = "success",
              solidHeader = TRUE,
              width = 12,
              collapsible = TRUE,
              plotlyOutput("trendChart", height = "300px")
            )
          )
        )
      ),
      
      # Edible Oil Tab
      tabItem(
        tabName = "edibleoil",
        h2("Edible Oil Import Analysis"),
        fluidRow(
          column(3,
            box(
              title = "Filters",
              status = "info",
              solidHeader = TRUE,
              width = 12,
              selectInput("oilType", "Select Oil Type:",
                          choices = c("All", "Palm Oil", "Soybean Oil", "Sunflower Oil"),
                          selected = "All"),
              sliderInput("oilYearRange", "Year Range:",
                          min = 2010, max = 2024,
                          value = c(2010, 2024),
                          sep = ""),
              selectInput("countryFilter", "Country Focus:",
                          choices = c("All", "Indonesia", "Malaysia", "Argentina", "Brazil", "Ukraine", "Russia"),
                          selected = "All")
            )
          ),
          column(9,
            tabBox(
              width = 12,
              tabPanel("Import Trends",
                       plotlyOutput("oilImportChart", height = "500px")),
              tabPanel("Country Share",
                       plotlyOutput("oilCountryChart", height = "500px")),
              tabPanel("Data Table",
                       DTOutput("oilDataTable"))
            )
          )
        )
      ),
      
      # Fertilizer Tab
      tabItem(
        tabName = "fertilizer",
        h2("Fertilizer Import Analysis"),
        fluidRow(
          column(3,
            box(
              title = "Fertilizer Filters",
              status = "warning",
              solidHeader = TRUE,
              width = 12,
              selectInput("fertType", "Fertilizer Type:",
                          choices = c("Urea", "DAP", "Rock Phosphate", "Phosphoric Acid", "Potash"),
                          selected = "Urea"),
              sliderInput("fertYearRange", "Year Range:",
                          min = 2016, max = 2024,
                          value = c(2016, 2024)),
              checkboxGroupInput("fertCountries", "Show Countries:",
                                 choices = c("China", "Russia", "Morocco", "Jordan", "Canada", "Others"),
                                 selected = c("China", "Russia"))
            )
          ),
          column(9,
            tabBox(
              width = 12,
              tabPanel("Import Volume",
                       plotlyOutput("fertImportChart", height = "500px")),
              tabPanel("Country Distribution",
                       plotlyOutput("fertCountryChart", height = "500px")),
              tabPanel("Monthly Trends",
                       plotlyOutput("fertMonthlyChart", height = "500px"))
            )
          )
        )
      ),
      
      # Procurement Tab
      tabItem(
        tabName = "procurement",
        h2("Food Grain Procurement Analysis"),
        fluidRow(
          column(4,
            box(
              title = "Procurement Filters",
              status = "success",
              solidHeader = TRUE,
              width = 12,
              selectInput("cropType", "Select Crop:",
                          choices = c("All", "Paddy", "Wheat", "Rice"),
                          selected = "All"),
              sliderInput("procYearRange", "Marketing Season:",
                          min = 2010, max = 2025,
                          value = c(2010, 2025)),
              radioButtons("agencyType", "Procurement Agency:",
                           choices = c("All", "FCI", "State Agencies"),
                           selected = "All")
            )
          ),
          column(8,
            box(
              title = "Procurement Trends",
              status = "primary",
              solidHeader = TRUE,
              width = 12,
              plotlyOutput("procurementChart", height = "500px")
            ),
            box(
              title = "Seasonal Patterns",
              status = "info",
              solidHeader = TRUE,
              width = 12,
              plotlyOutput("seasonalChart", height = "400px")
            )
          )
        )
      ),
      
      # Stocks Tab
      tabItem(
        tabName = "stocks",
        h2("Food Stock Management"),
        fluidRow(
          column(3,
            box(
              title = "Stock Filters",
              status = "danger",
              solidHeader = TRUE,
              width = 12,
              selectInput("commodityType", "Commodity:",
                          choices = c("All", "Wheat", "Rice", "Unmilled Paddy", "Coarsegrain"),
                          selected = "All"),
              dateRangeInput("stockDateRange", "Date Range:",
                             start = "2023-01-01",
                             end = "2025-02-01"),
              radioButtons("stockView", "View Type:",
                           choices = c("Absolute Values", "Percentage Share"),
                           selected = "Absolute Values")
            )
          ),
          column(9,
            fluidRow(
              box(
                title = "Stock Levels Over Time",
                status = "primary",
                solidHeader = TRUE,
                width = 12,
                plotlyOutput("stockChart", height = "500px")
              )
            ),
            fluidRow(
              box(
                title = "Recent Stock Status",
                status = "info",
                solidHeader = TRUE,
                width = 12,
                DTOutput("stockTable")
              )
            )
          )
        )
      ),
      
      # Trade Tab
      tabItem(
        tabName = "trade",
        h2("Trade Analysis"),
        fluidRow(
          column(3,
            box(
              title = "Trade Filters",
              status = "info",
              solidHeader = TRUE,
              width = 12,
              selectInput("tradeFlow", "Trade Flow:",
                          choices = c("Exports", "Imports", "Trade Balance"),
                          selected = "Exports"),
              selectInput("hsCategory", "HS Category:",
                          choices = c("All", "Cereals (10)", "Fertilizers (31)", 
                                      "Fats & Oils (15)", "Petroleum (27)"),
                          selected = "All"),
              sliderInput("tradeYearRange", "Year Range:",
                          min = 1997, max = 2025,
                          value = c(2010, 2024))
            )
          ),
          column(9,
            tabBox(
              width = 12,
              height = "600px",
              tabPanel("Trade Trends",
                       plotlyOutput("tradeTrendChart", height = "550px")),
              tabPanel("Commodity Breakdown",
                       plotlyOutput("tradeCommodityChart", height = "550px")),
              tabPanel("Trade Balance Analysis",
                       plotlyOutput("tradeBalanceChart", height = "550px"))
            )
          )
        )
      ),
      
      # Fuel Price Tab
      tabItem(
        tabName = "fuelprice",
        h2("Fuel Price Analysis"),
        fluidRow(
          column(3,
            box(
              title = "Fuel Price Filters",
              status = "warning",
              solidHeader = TRUE,
              width = 12,
              selectInput("fuelType", "Fuel Type:",
                          choices = c("Crude Oil", "Diesel", "Petrol"),
                          selected = "Crude Oil"),
              selectInput("citySelect", "City (for retail prices):",
                          choices = c("Delhi", "Mumbai", "Chennai", "Kolkata"),
                          selected = "Delhi"),
              dateRangeInput("fuelDateRange", "Date Range:",
                             start = "2018-01-01",
                             end = "2025-12-31"),
              radioButtons("priceType", "Price Type:",
                           choices = c("International", "Retail"),
                           selected = "International")
            )
          ),
          column(9,
            tabBox(
              width = 12,
              tabPanel("Price Trends",
                       plotlyOutput("fuelPriceChart", height = "500px")),
              tabPanel("International vs Retail",
                       plotlyOutput("fuelComparisonChart", height = "500px")),
              tabPanel("Monthly Analysis",
                       plotlyOutput("fuelMonthlyChart", height = "500px"))
            )
          )
        )
      ),
      
      # Download Tab
      tabItem(
        tabName = "download",
        h2("Data Download Center"),
        fluidRow(
          column(12,
            box(
              title = "Available Datasets",
              status = "primary",
              solidHeader = TRUE,
              width = 12,
              DTOutput("datasetTable")
            )
          )
        ),
        fluidRow(
          column(4,
            box(
              title = "Download Options",
              status = "info",
              solidHeader = TRUE,
              width = 12,
              selectInput("datasetSelect", "Select Dataset:",
                          choices = c("Edible Oil Imports", "Fertilizer Imports",
                                      "Food Procurement", "Food Stocks",
                                      "Trade Data", "Fuel Prices")),
              radioButtons("downloadFormat", "Format:",
                           choices = c("CSV", "Excel", "JSON")),
              downloadButton("downloadData", "Download Dataset",
                           class = "btn-primary btn-block")
            )
          ),
          column(8,
            box(
              title = "Data Preview",
              status = "success",
              solidHeader = TRUE,
              width = 12,
              DTOutput("previewTable")
            )
          )
        )
      ),
      
      # About Tab
      tabItem(
        tabName = "about",
        fluidRow(
          column(12,
            box(
              title = "About This Dashboard",
              status = "primary",
              solidHeader = TRUE,
              width = 12,
              tags$div(
                style = "font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.8;",
                tags$h3("India Agricultural & Trade Dashboard"),
                tags$p("This dashboard provides comprehensive analysis of India's:"),
                tags$ul(
                  tags$li("Edible oil import patterns and trends"),
                  tags$li("Fertilizer import requirements and sources"),
                  tags$li("Food grain procurement operations"),
                  tags$li("Food stock management and distribution"),
                  tags$li("International trade flows and balances"),
                  tags$li("Fuel price dynamics and trends")
                ),
                tags$hr(),
                tags$h4("Data Sources:"),
                tags$p("Government of India databases including:"),
                tags$ul(
                  tags$li("Ministry of Commerce and Industry"),
                  tags$li("Department of Food and Public Distribution"),
                  tags$li("Petroleum Planning & Analysis Cell"),
                  tags$li("Food Corporation of India")
                ),
                tags$hr(),
                tags$h4("Technical Information:"),
                tags$p("Built with:"),
                tags$ul(
                  tags$li("R Shiny for interactive visualization"),
                  tags$li("Plotly for interactive charts"),
                  tags$li("DataTables for tabular data display"),
                  tags$li("Custom CSS for enhanced styling")
                )
              )
            )
          )
        )
      )
    )
  )
)

# Server Logic
server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # Reactive data loading (simulated - in real app, load actual data)
  oil_data <- reactive({
    # Simulate edible oil data
    data.frame(
      Year = rep(2010:2024, each = 3),
      OilType = rep(c("Palm Oil", "Soybean Oil", "Sunflower Oil"), times = 15),
      Quantity = c(
        round(runif(15, 5000000, 8000000)),  # Palm
        round(runif(15, 1000000, 3000000)),  # Soybean
        round(runif(15, 500000, 2500000))    # Sunflower
      ),
      Country = sample(c("Indonesia", "Malaysia", "Argentina", "Brazil", "Ukraine", "Russia"), 
                       45, replace = TRUE)
    )
  })
  
  # Overview value boxes
  output$totalImports <- renderValueBox({
    valueBox(
      "15.6M tons",
      "Total Edible Oil Imports (2023-24)",
      icon = icon("ship"),
      color = "blue"
    )
  })
  
  output$procurementVolume <- renderValueBox({
    valueBox(
      "144.7M tons",
      "Total Procurement (2022-23)",
      icon = icon("tractor"),
      color = "green"
    )
  })
  
  output$stockLevel <- renderValueBox({
    valueBox(
      "100.5M tons",
      "Peak Food Stock (Feb 2025)",
      icon = icon("warehouse"),
      color = "yellow"
    )
  })
  
  output$tradeBalance <- renderValueBox({
    valueBox(
      "-$267B",
      "Trade Balance (2023-24)",
      icon = icon("balance-scale"),
      color = "red"
    )
  })
  
  # Trend chart
  output$trendChart <- renderPlotly({
    plot_ly(
      x = 2010:2024,
      y = cumsum(runif(15, 5, 15)),
      type = 'scatter',
      mode = 'lines+markers',
      line = list(color = '#3498db', width = 3),
      marker = list(size = 8),
      name = 'Import Value Trend'
    ) %>%
      layout(
        title = list(text = "Import Value Trend (USD Billion)", font = list(size = 14)),
        xaxis = list(title = "Year"),
        yaxis = list(title = "Value (USD Billion)"),
        hovermode = 'x unified'
      )
  })
  
  # Edible Oil Charts
  output$oilImportChart <- renderPlotly({
    filtered_data <- oil_data() %>%
      filter(Year >= input$oilYearRange[1], Year <= input$oilYearRange[2])
    
    if(input$oilType != "All") {
      filtered_data <- filtered_data %>% filter(OilType == input$oilType)
    }
    
    plot_ly(
      data = filtered_data,
      x = ~Year,
      y = ~Quantity,
      color = ~OilType,
      type = 'bar',
      text = ~paste(round(Quantity/1000000, 1), "M tons"),
      hoverinfo = 'text'
    ) %>%
      layout(
        title = "Edible Oil Imports by Type",
        xaxis = list(title = "Year"),
        yaxis = list(title = "Quantity (tons)"),
        barmode = 'stack'
      )
  })
  
  output$oilCountryChart <- renderPlotly({
    country_data <- oil_data() %>%
      group_by(Country, OilType) %>%
      summarise(Total = sum(Quantity), .groups = 'drop')
    
    plot_ly(
      data = country_data,
      labels = ~Country,
      values = ~Total,
      type = 'pie',
      hole = 0.4,
      textinfo = 'label+percent',
      marker = list(colors = c('#1f77b4', '#ff7f0e', '#2ca02c', '#d62728', '#9467bd', '#8c564b'))
    ) %>%
      layout(
        title = "Country Share in Edible Oil Imports"
      )
  })
  
  output$oilDataTable <- renderDT({
    datatable(
      oil_data(),
      options = list(
        pageLength = 10,
        scrollX = TRUE,
        dom = 'Bfrtip',
        buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'pdf', 'print')
      ),
      class = 'display compact'
    )
  })
  
  # Fertilizer Charts
  output$fertImportChart <- renderPlotly({
    # Simulated fertilizer data
    fert_data <- data.frame(
      Year = rep(2016:2024, each = 5),
      Type = rep(c("Urea", "DAP", "Rock Phosphate", "Phosphoric Acid", "Potash"), times = 9),
      Quantity = round(runif(45, 1000000, 5000000))
    )
    
    filtered_fert <- fert_data %>%
      filter(Type == input$fertType,
             Year >= input$fertYearRange[1],
             Year <= input$fertYearRange[2])
    
    plot_ly(
      data = filtered_fert,
      x = ~Year,
      y = ~Quantity,
      type = 'scatter',
      mode = 'lines+markers',
      line = list(color = '#e74c3c', width = 3),
      marker = list(size = 10),
      name = input$fertType
    ) %>%
      layout(
        title = paste(input$fertType, "Import Trends"),
        xaxis = list(title = "Year"),
        yaxis = list(title = "Quantity (tons)")
      )
  })
  
  # Procurement Chart
  output$procurementChart <- renderPlotly({
    # Simulated procurement data
    proc_data <- data.frame(
      Year = rep(2010:2024, each = 3),
      Crop = rep(c("Paddy", "Wheat", "Rice"), times = 15),
      Quantity = c(
        round(runif(15, 30000000, 60000000)),  # Paddy
        round(runif(15, 20000000, 40000000)),  # Wheat
        round(runif(15, 10000000, 30000000))   # Rice
      )
    )
    
    filtered_proc <- proc_data
    
    if(input$cropType != "All") {
      filtered_proc <- filtered_proc %>% filter(Crop == input$cropType)
    }
    
    plot_ly(
      data = filtered_proc,
      x = ~Year,
      y = ~Quantity,
      color = ~Crop,
      type = 'bar',
      text = ~paste(round(Quantity/1000000, 1), "M tons"),
      hoverinfo = 'text'
    ) %>%
      layout(
        title = "Food Grain Procurement",
        xaxis = list(title = "Year"),
        yaxis = list(title = "Quantity (tons)"),
        barmode = ifelse(input$cropType == "All", "stack", "group")
      )
  })
  
  # Stock Chart
  output$stockChart <- renderPlotly({
    # Simulated stock data
    stock_data <- data.frame(
      Date = seq.Date(as.Date("2023-01-01"), as.Date("2025-02-01"), by = "month"),
      Wheat = round(runif(26, 5000000, 35000000)),
      Rice = round(runif(26, 10000000, 34000000)),
      Paddy = round(runif(26, 20000000, 50000000)),
      Coarsegrain = round(runif(26, 1000000, 5000000))
    ) %>%
      pivot_longer(cols = -Date, names_to = "Commodity", values_to = "Stock")
    
    filtered_stock <- stock_data %>%
      filter(Date >= input$stockDateRange[1],
             Date <= input$stockDateRange[2])
    
    if(input$commodityType != "All") {
      filtered_stock <- filtered_stock %>% filter(Commodity == input$commodityType)
    }
    
    plot_ly(
      data = filtered_stock,
      x = ~Date,
      y = ~Stock,
      color = ~Commodity,
      type = 'scatter',
      mode = 'lines',
      line = list(width = 3)
    ) %>%
      layout(
        title = "Food Stock Levels Over Time",
        xaxis = list(title = "Date"),
        yaxis = list(title = "Stock (tons)")
      )
  })
  
  output$stockTable <- renderDT({
    # Sample stock data
    stock_sample <- data.frame(
      Month = c("Feb 2025", "Jan 2025", "Dec 2024", "Nov 2024"),
      Wheat = c(3400000, 3200000, 3000000, 2800000),
      Rice = c(3400000, 3300000, 3200000, 3100000),
      Paddy = c(5010000, 4900000, 4800000, 4700000),
      Total = c(10050000, 9800000, 9600000, 9400000)
    )
    
    datatable(
      stock_sample,
      options = list(
        pageLength = 5,
        dom = 't'
      ),
      rownames = FALSE
    ) %>%
      formatRound(columns = 2:5, digits = 0)
  })
  
  # Trade Charts
  output$tradeTrendChart <- renderPlotly({
    # Simulated trade data
    trade_data <- data.frame(
      Year = 1997:2024,
      Exports = cumsum(runif(28, 5, 15)) * 1000,
      Imports = cumsum(runif(28, 8, 20)) * 1000
    ) %>%
      mutate(Trade_Balance = Exports - Imports)
    
    filtered_trade <- trade_data %>%
      filter(Year >= input$tradeYearRange[1],
             Year <= input$tradeYearRange[2])
    
    y_var <- switch(input$tradeFlow,
                    "Exports" = ~Exports,
                    "Imports" = ~Imports,
                    "Trade Balance" = ~Trade_Balance)
    
    plot_ly(
      data = filtered_trade,
      x = ~Year,
      y = y_var,
      type = 'scatter',
      mode = 'lines+markers',
      line = list(width = 3),
      marker = list(size = 8),
      name = input$tradeFlow
    ) %>%
      layout(
        title = paste(input$tradeFlow, "Trend"),
        xaxis = list(title = "Year"),
        yaxis = list(title = "USD Million")
      )
  })
  
  # Fuel Price Chart
  output$fuelPriceChart <- renderPlotly({
    # Simulated fuel price data
    fuel_data <- data.frame(
      Date = seq.Date(as.Date("2018-01-01"), as.Date("2025-12-31"), by = "month"),
      Crude_Oil = cumsum(runif(96, -5, 5)) + 60,
      Diesel = cumsum(runif(96, -3, 3)) + 80,
      Petrol = cumsum(runif(96, -3, 3)) + 85
    ) %>%
      pivot_longer(cols = -Date, names_to = "Fuel", values_to = "Price")
    
    filtered_fuel <- fuel_data %>%
      filter(Date >= input$fuelDateRange[1],
             Date <= input$fuelDateRange[2])
    
    if(input$fuelType != "All") {
      fuel_name <- gsub(" ", "_", input$fuelType)
      filtered_fuel <- filtered_fuel %>% filter(Fuel == fuel_name)
    }
    
    plot_ly(
      data = filtered_fuel,
      x = ~Date,
      y = ~Price,
      color = ~Fuel,
      type = 'scatter',
      mode = 'lines',
      line = list(width = 2)
    ) %>%
      layout(
        title = paste(input$fuelType, "Price Trend"),
        xaxis = list(title = "Date"),
        yaxis = list(title = "Price (USD/Barrel or Rs/Liter)")
      )
  })
  
  # Dataset Table for Download
  output$datasetTable <- renderDT({
    datasets <- data.frame(
      Dataset = c("Edible Oil Imports", "Fertilizer Imports", "Food Procurement",
                  "Food Stocks", "Trade Data", "Fuel Prices"),
      Time_Period = c("2010-2024", "2016-2024", "2010-2025",
                      "2000-2025", "1997-2025", "2018-2025"),
      Records = c("45,000", "32,000", "15,000", "12,000", "28,000", "9,600"),
      Last_Updated = rep("2025-11-01", 6),
      Size = c("15 MB", "8 MB", "5 MB", "4 MB", "12 MB", "7 MB")
    )
    
    datatable(
      datasets,
      options = list(
        pageLength = 6,
        dom = 't'
      ),
      rownames = FALSE,
      class = 'display compact'
    )
  })
  
  output$previewTable <- renderDT({
    # Sample preview data based on selection
    sample_data <- switch(input$datasetSelect,
      "Edible Oil Imports" = oil_data(),
      "Fertilizer Imports" = data.frame(
        Year = 2020:2024,
        Type = sample(c("Urea", "DAP"), 5, replace = TRUE),
        Quantity = round(runif(5, 1000000, 5000000)),
        Country = sample(c("China", "Russia", "Morocco"), 5, replace = TRUE)
      ),
      "Food Procurement" = data.frame(
        Year = 2020:2024,
        Crop = sample(c("Paddy", "Wheat"), 5, replace = TRUE),
        Quantity = round(runif(5, 10000000, 50000000)),
        State = sample(c("Punjab", "Madhya Pradesh", "Haryana"), 5, replace = TRUE)
      ),
      data.frame(
        Variable = c("Sample", "Data", "For", "Preview"),
        Value = 1:4
      )
    )
    
    datatable(
      head(sample_data, 10),
      options = list(
        pageLength = 5,
        dom = 't'
      ),
      rownames = FALSE
    )
  })
  
  # Download handler
  output$downloadData <- downloadHandler(
    filename = function() {
      paste0(input$datasetSelect, "_", Sys.Date(), ".", tolower(input$downloadFormat))
    },
    content = function(file) {
      # In real app, write actual data
      write.csv(data.frame(
        Note = "This is sample data. In production, actual data would be exported."
      ), file, row.names = FALSE)
    }
  )
}

# Run the application
shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
